message:
feat(engine): add 269 enrichment integration tests across 5 modules + fix hostcall MAC bug

Tenth batch of enrichment tests:

- hindsight_trace_escalator: 43 tests (existing, reformatted)
- hostcall_batch_transport: 46 tests (existing, fixed MAC consistency)
- hostcall_conformance_governance: 67 tests (conformance rules,
  governance decisions, audit trails, compliance verification)
- ifc_artifacts: 52 tests (flow labels, lattice operations, IFC
  proofs, artifact generation, declassification policies)
- js_runtime_lane: 61 tests (lane configurations, execution profiles,
  runtime switching, resource isolation, performance tracking)

Bug fix: hostcall_batch_transport.rs corpus and tests used inconsistent
session keys for build_batch vs submit_batch, causing MAC verification
failures. Fixed by using consistent session_key() across all operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
